title: Zero In Kitchen Insect Killer Adhesive Yellow Stick, 26cm Hang or Stand Poison-Free Controls Flies, Fungus Gnats, Fruit Flies, Mosquitoes and Bugs Disposable
features: DISCREET INSECT CONTROL: Decorative cardboard cover hides dead flies from sight Ideal for use in kitchens, conservatories, and living room areas
EFFECTIVE: Bright aureola yellow adhesive stick attracts and kills flying insects with a long-lasting adhesive coating for summer-long protection
EASY SET-UP: Remove perforated cardboard cover and either hang using the hook provided or lay-flat on windowsills and work surfaces in affected areas
BIODEGRADABLE: Simply cover with newspaper when full and safely dispose of with household waste
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Kitchen Insect Killer Poison-free fly control Attract and kill household flies and insects with Zero In Kitchen Insect Killer. Hang or discreetly position the aureola yellow adhesive stick within its box to hide dead flies from sight. With a long-lasting adhesive coating, the 26cm long glue trap is ideal for kitchens, conservatories and living rooms. Poison-free insect control supplied in a variety of coloured packs. Attracts and kills household flies and insects. Long-lasting adhesive coating. Integrated hanger. Product can also be used within its box to hide dead flies from sight. Poison-free insect control. Product Highlights Kills Flies & Insects Aureola yellow adhesive stick attracts and kills flying insects in kitchens, conservatories and living spaces. Poison-Free Control Safe for use around children and pets, these easy-to-use traps do not contain any nasty chemicals or poisons. 24/7 Protection Versatile design and long-lasting adhesive means the product can hang or stand within its box to provide continuous protection against household flies. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of flying insect control solutions including traps, aerosols, electronic devices and more - everything you need for complete protection against flying insects. Poison-Free Pest Control Keep your home free of pests with the range of poison-free insect control solutions from Zero In.
